# archive

```go
import "github.com/lucasassuncao/movelooper/internal/archive"
```

Package archive packs a set of on\-disk files into a single compressed archive \(zip or tar.gz\). It is agnostic of movelooper's config and tokens: it takes explicit \(source, entry\-name\) pairs and writes the archive atomically.

## Index

- [func Extension\(f Format\) string](<#Extension>)

<a name="Extension"></a>
## func [Extension](<https://github.com/lucasassuncao/movelooper/blob/main/internal/archive/archive.go#L47>)

```go
func Extension(f Format) string
```

Extension returns the filename extension for f, including the leading dot.

<a name="Write"></a>
## func [Write](<https://github.com/lucasassuncao/movelooper/blob/main/internal/archive/archive.go#L58>)

```go
func Write(ctx context.Context, destPath string, entries []Entry, opts Options) (retErr error)
```

Write creates an archive at destPath containing entries, atomically: it writes to destPath\+".tmp", fsyncs, then renames into place. Each entry is streamed \(never fully buffered\). On any error no file is left at destPath. ctx cancels between entries.

<a name="Compression"></a>
## type [Compression](<https://github.com/lucasassuncao/movelooper/blob/main/internal/archive/archive.go#L21>)

Compression selects the effort/speed trade\-off. Empty means CompressionBest.

```go
type Compression string
```

<a name="CompressionNone"></a>

```go
const (
    CompressionNone Compression = "none"
    CompressionFast Compression = "fast"
    CompressionBest Compression = "best"
)
```

<a name="Entry"></a>
## type [Entry](<https://github.com/lucasassuncao/movelooper/blob/main/internal/archive/archive.go#L31-L34>)

Entry is one file to add: an absolute on\-disk Source and the slash\-separated Name it takes inside the archive.

```go
type Entry struct {
    Source string
    Name   string
}
```

<a name="Format"></a>
## type [Format](<https://github.com/lucasassuncao/movelooper/blob/main/internal/archive/archive.go#L13>)

Format identifies the archive container/compression combination.

```go
type Format string
```

<a name="FormatZip"></a>

```go
const (
    FormatZip   Format = "zip"
    FormatTarGz Format = "tar.gz"
)
```

<a name="Options"></a>
## type [Options](<https://github.com/lucasassuncao/movelooper/blob/main/internal/archive/archive.go#L37-L44>)

Options configure a Write call.

```go
type Options struct {
    Format      Format
    Compression Compression
    // OnProgress, when set, is called after each entry is written with the number
    // of entries done so far and the total. It runs synchronously on the writing
    // goroutine, so keep it fast. nil disables progress reporting.
    OnProgress func(done, total int)
}
```
